## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Not run; reason:

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR is scoped to one coherent change.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for schema, ports, validation, compiler, exporter, runtime params, or generated-code shape changes.
- [ ] User-facing workflow changes are reflected in `README.md`.
- [ ] Package or pipeline changes are reflected in `architecture.md`.
- [ ] Visual styling, graph node, control, or editor layout changes follow `STYLEGUIDE.md`.
- [ ] Exported effects remain standalone and do not import React, builder modules, or private local code.
- [ ] No generated clutter, build output, local planning files, or large binary assets are committed.
